proofBoundary.statement: This specification declares external readiness requirements; it is not migration or deployment proof.

invariants.requirement: mcn_agencies.supplier_id is nonempty and unique, providing one supplier_id for each targeted mcn_id
evidence: readiness query returns exactly one supplier_id for every targeted mcn_id

invariants.requirement: one send context exists per (mcn_recommendation_id, requirement_id); resend requires a new mcn_recommendation_id
evidence: unique or transactional idempotency proof for (mcn_recommendation_id, requirement_id)
resend scenario creates a new mcn_recommendation_id

invariants.requirement: provider send uses a stable business correlation key and an unknown outcome is queried with that key before any retry
evidence: provider contract documents the stable correlation key
timeout scenario queries provider state and does not issue a second send

invariants.requirement: first sync transactionally creates or reuses one snapshot, one inquiry batch, one inquiry per supplier, and one cron
evidence: transaction and uniqueness constraints cover snapshot, inquiry batch, supplier inquiry, and cron writes
concurrent first-sync test returns the same snapshot, inquiry batch, inquiries, and cron

invariants.requirement: provider_distribution_id is unique and every token and fill_link is nonempty and unique
evidence: unique constraints cover provider_distribution_id, token, and fill_link
provider integration test rejects empty or duplicate references

invariants.requirement: submission ingest is idempotent on (provider_distribution_id, provider_row_id)
evidence: duplicate-row integration test preserves one logical submission item

invariants.requirement: recovery uses compare-and-swap or a row lock so concurrent manual and scheduled recovery permit one ingest owner
evidence: CAS predicate or row-lock transaction is documented
manual-versus-scheduled concurrency test observes one ingest owner

invariants.requirement: creator merge priority is mcn_submission > manual_source > candidate_pool and automatic rank accepts only accepted records
evidence: three-source collision fixture selects the documented priority winner
ranking fixture excludes need_review and every status other than accepted

invariants.requirement: retry for a run returns its current unfinished submission batch; a new batch is created only after continue_submission
evidence: same-run retry test returns the existing unfinished batch identifier
new-batch test succeeds only after feedback next_action is continue_submission
